newsSince: The only window events are a 10-for-1 stock split effective June 12 and a ~21% dividend hike, both cosmetic/capital-return items the page lens already flagged as flow-chase. The ~-88.5% reported move is purely the split adjustment, not a fundamental change. Process-control demand for AI fabs/HBM and advanced packaging remains the underlying driver; no new orders, guidance change, or export-control news in the window.

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node bottleneck lens: process-control intensity at 2nm/GAA and HBM keeps the node case intact. June 12 split and dividend hike are cosmetic, not fundamental; prior cases already de-rated for the split-flow spike. No new node-relevant news -> hold.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Process-control intensity rising at 2nm/GAA and HBM capacity adds
verdicts.bull: Indispensable inspection/metrology gatekeeper for leading-edge AI fabs and HBM yield; demand multi-year.
verdicts.neutral: Real bottleneck exposure but mature, well-owned mega-cap; split/dividend add nothing to the node thesis.
verdicts.bear: Steep YTD re-rating and crowded ownership leave little hidden alpha; export-control and cycle risk persist.

verdicts.rankRationale: Co-packaged-optics/crowding-sensitive alpha lens: prior verdict already moved KLA down for the June 8 split-flow pop. The June 12 split and dividend are confirmation, not new fundamental evidence on photonics/packaging yield. Discovery already high; no further move warranted -> hold.
verdicts.primaryRisk: High valuation, capex cycle, crowded flow-chase
verdicts.bull: Metrology/inspection is essential to CPO and advanced-packaging yield ramps as optics move on-package.
verdicts.neutral: CPO exposure is indirect and discovery is high; the split is pure flow, not residual alpha.
verdicts.bear: Cosmetic-catalyst pop into a crowded mega-cap shrinks residual alpha on a CPO-purity screen.

verdicts.rankRationale: Under-owned-bottleneck master list: prior verdict already moved KLA down for the YTD re-rating and recognition. Split/dividend in the window are capital-return cosmetics with no fundamental shift; re-penalizing would double-count. Pick-and-shovel exposure intact -> hold.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Leading-edge capacity adds drive process-control input demand
verdicts.primaryRisk: Valuation/recognition risk; inspection-metrology pricing and execution
verdicts.bull: Best-in-class process-control franchise riding AI fab and HBM capacity; durable pricing.
verdicts.neutral: Quality bottleneck name but already widely recognized and richly valued; measured upside.
verdicts.bear: Well-discovered at a $321B cap; alpha from scarce bottleneck exposure largely captured.
